description: A subject, trend, or content idea that drives media conversations, including hot topics, content选题 (topic selections), and emerging trends

name.description: 主题的名称或关键词，例如：AI换脸、春节营销、元宇宙

category.description: Category of the topic, e.g. 科技, 娱乐, 社会, 商业, 生活方式

trend_direction.description: Current trend direction of this topic's popularity

related_topics.description: Related or subtopics associated with this topic

platform.description: 该主题正在流行或相关的平台
